stemHtml:
Given that you are cruising in a light, single engine aircraft which suffers an engine failure. You have two options, both 17 NM from the aircraft in different directions, and both at mean sea level, airport A and airport B. Considering the following conditions, and discounting any height loss for manoeuvring, which airport(s) can your aircraft potentially reach?

Cruising altitude: 8000 ft
Flying to airport A: 15 kt headwind
Flying to airport B: 15 kt tailwind
TAS: 150 kt
L/D ratio: 12/1
Assume 1 NM = 6000 ft

options.a: You can reach Airport A but not Airport B.
